title: Lad's Cassettes
description: Changes music discs to cassette tapes without changing the jukebox
body:
Lad's Cassettes changes Minecraft's music disc textures to cassette tapes. I tried to do this in a unique way while preserving the Minecraft artstyle. This pack doesn't change the jukebox because I think it's just fine the way it already is.

<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>
  
You may:
- Modify this pack for personal use
- Include this project in modpacks uploaded to Modrinth

You may not:
- Reupload or redistribute this pack or any assets from this page in ANY form

</details>

<details>
<summary>About Updates</summary>

I usually only test pack updates on the latest version of Minecraft. Resource packs are almost always backwards and forwards compatible. If you experience any issues or if the pack doesn't work, please report it to me.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

This pack was inspired by [Cassette Discs 1.0](https://modrinth.com/project/HUjNokY8) by Monobloc_Chair and [Rena's Cassettes](https://modrinth.com/project/GOSFdHhZ) by Renayawn


</details>

If you have a feature request, feel free to create an issue on my issue tracker
